rows.notes: Clear year at top of page, large centered numerals are unambiguous.
Title is centered and clearly written in a larger, legible hand.

Top-most ledger line under header: amount columns align clearly to '4 | 14 | 0'. Description is moderately ambiguous (handwriting unclear), chosen transcription follows letter shapes seen ('vicitzi accom:').
Amount reads clearly as '1 | 0 | 8'. Description text is partially unclear; letters interpreted as 'vicie clustringe' based on visible strokes but uncertain.
Amount aligned to '10 | 4 | 0' (pounds and shillings clear). Description faint; read as 'sri titti' by shape of letters but could be otherwise.
Amount columns read as '4 | 12 | 6'. Text is somewhat legible in parts ('Coll. men.') but the surname/word is unclear and transcribed tentatively.
Amount '12 | 6 | 0' is clear. Description reads more clearly than earlier lines as 'Coll. Salvieri' though final letters are slightly faded.
Amount '12 | 6 | 0' is well aligned. The abbreviation 'D. J. Bapt' is clearly written; small uncertainty only in exact punctuation.
Amount '0 | 2 | 0' (2 shillings) is legible. Description letters are faint; read as 'Supervisors Welfs' but some letters uncertain.
Description 'Janitor' is crisp and clear. Amount '10 | 0 | 0' is aligned and unambiguous.
Description 'Biblio-cler. ad Fest. Nat. 1824' is mostly legible. Amount reads '1 | 14 | 0' though the pounds column is small (1 pound) and clear from alignment.

Continuation entry 'ad F. S. Mich' (abbreviated) is legible enough. Amount '15 | 0 | 0' is clear.

Continuation line 'ad F. Ann: 1825' clear. Amount '20 | 0 | 0' is well aligned and readable.
Another festival payment line; amount '20 | 0 | 0' clear. The abbreviated festival label matches earlier pattern.
Continuation of similar festival payments; amount '20 | 0 | 0' clearly written.

Description 'River-Water from the City Works' readable. Amount appears as '5 | 5 | 0' though the second digit is slightly faint; alignment matches other rows.
